faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Got questions about AI Barber? We've got answers.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: What is AI Barber and how does it work?
items.answer: AI Barber is an AI-powered tool that allows you to virtually try on different hairstyles. Simply upload your photo, select your hair, and choose a style to generate a new look.

items.question: How accurate is the hairstyle transformation?
items.answer: Our advanced AI algorithms are designed to produce highly realistic and accurate transformations, taking into account your face shape and hair texture.

items.question: Can I use AI Barber for any hair type or length?
items.answer: Yes, AI Barber works with various hair types and lengths. However, for best results, use a clear photo with good lighting.

items.question: Are there any costs involved?
items.answer: We offer both free and premium plans. The free plan allows you to try basic features, while the premium plan unlocks high-resolution downloads and more styles.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes, we take your privacy seriously. Your photos are processed securely and are not shared with third parties.

items.question: Can I save or share the generated hairstyles?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can download your transformations and share them on social media directly from the platform.

cta.title: Ready for a new look?
